relationships.description: Increases early season weed growth compared to mouldboard plough
Associated with increased mid- to late-season weed growth
Improves soil moisture conservation during low precipitation
Suppresses weeds early in the cropping season
Results in low grain yield for cowpea and sorghum
Produces higher grain yield than minimum tillage
Makes soil moisture conservation more critical
Includes minimum tillage as a core practice
Requires higher labor supply for weeding
